---
title: "DEM_processing"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-16"
---
```{r}
library(XML)
```

```{r}
gpx_parsed <- htmlTreeParse(file = paste0(WKDir,"data/hubs.gpx"), useInternalNodes = TRUE)
coords <- xpathSApply(doc = gpx_parsed, path = "//trkpt", fun = xmlAttrs)
elevation <- xpathSApply(doc = gpx_parsed, path = "//trkpt/ele", fun = xmlValue)

hubs <- data.frame(
  lat = as.numeric(coords["lat", ]),
  lon = as.numeric(coords["lon", ]),
  elevation = as.numeric(elevation)
)





```

```{r}
# Getting occurrences records
occ_wol_herb_all <- galah_call() |>
  galah_identify("Plantae") |>
  geolocate(wol_bound) |>
  galah_filter(
    basisOfRecord == "PRESERVED_SPECIMEN",
    imageIDsCount >=1,
    year >= 2015
  ) |>
  galah_select(institutionID, informationWithheld, raw_informationWithheld,occurrenceID,coordinateUncertaintyInMeters, verbatimLatitude, verbatimLongitude, group = "basic")  |>
atlas_occurrences()

occ_wol_herb <- occ_wol_herb_all %>% filter(!is.na(eventDate))
```
